## Commit Message Instructions

1. Use the format `<type>(<scope>): <description>` (Conventional Commits)
2. Choose a type from: feat, fix, docs, style, refactor, perf, test, chore, ci, build
3. Keep the subject line under 100 characters, written in imperative mood
4. In the body, explain *what* and *why*, not *how*
5. Split changes affecting different features or purposes into separate commits, where each commit addresses a single feature or purpose
6. **Never** mention AI, Claude, Cursor, Copilot, or any assistant in messages
